description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the php Docker image globally and runs a global before_script that updates apt, installs git and unzip, downloads composer to /usr/local/bin/composer, makes it executable, and runs composer install --prefer-dist -n -q. Define the default test and deploy stages. Add a phpcs job in the test stage that allows failure, runs an echo before_script, then executes curl -OL https://squizlabs.github.io/PHP_CodeSniffer/phpcs.phar and php phpcs.phar --standard=psr2 src/. Add a test job in the test stage that runs ./vendor/bin/phpunit, and a test:5 job that uses the php:5 image and runs ./vendor/bin/phpunit. Add an insight job in the deploy stage that uses the tutum/curl image, runs only on the master branch, and posts to the SensioLabs Insight API with curl -X POST -H "Accept: application/vnd.com.sensiolabs.insight+xml" "https://$INSIGHT_USER:$INSIGHT_TOKEN@insight.sensiolabs.com/api/projects/$INSIGHT_PROJECT/analyses", and a packagist job in the deploy stage that also uses tutum/curl, runs only on tags, and triggers a Packagist update via curl -XPOST -H'content-type:application/json' "https://packagist.org/api/update-package?username=b17&apiToken=$PACKAGIST_API_TOKEN" -d'{"repository":{"url":"https://gitlab.com/vnphp/request-logger-bundle"}}'.
